title: Youtube Poop: Teh Lazer Collection
description:
((Edit: If you really want to watch this, all I can say is expect the worst.  This is one of the poorest I've done, yet it has so many views.  If you really want to watch this, go ahead, but this is NOT the real me.  I recommend you watch my more recent works instead of this.))

For my third Youtube Poop, I have done the unthinkable and pooped Dom Fera's Lazer Collection!

I added music to this one, along with some other stuff from my personal clipboard, and made it...well..."stranger" than it usually is. Enjoy! :)

Also, if Dom Fera happens to be watching this, shoop da whoop (whatever the heck that means).
